Turn YouTube Videos into Viral Twitter Threads

AI-powered extraction that transforms any YouTube video into engaging, ready-to-post Twitter threads in seconds.

Start Free

Features

AI-Powered Extraction

Automatically extracts key points and transforms them into engaging thread format.

Thread Formatting

Optimized for Twitter's character limits with natural flow and hooks.

One-Click Export

Copy to clipboard or schedule directly to your Twitter account.
